mechanisms.description: For marketplace apps and multi-account integrations
mechanisms.notes: Use grant_type=authorization_code for initial token, grant_type=refresh_token for refreshing

mechanisms.description: For app-level authentication (no user context), e.g., webhooks journal API
mechanisms.notes: No refresh token; re-issue JWT per request
Simpler setup but limited to one account

authentication.api_key_parameter: hapikey (query param, for developer API keys only)

public_oath_apps.notes: Each installed account has its own limit. Does not include CRM Search API.

rate_limits.retry_after: Resets every 10 seconds; auto-retry for workflows on 429

webhooks.retry_policy: Up to 10 retries over 24 hours for 4XX (except 429 auto-retry), 5XX auto-retry with custom code actions up to 3 days
webhooks.timeout: Webhook URL must respond; connection failure or timeout triggers retry

error_dictionary.description: Partial success for batch endpoints when multi-status error handling is enabled
error_dictionary.solution: Check individual status entries in response body for per-item errors

error_dictionary.description: Validation error, often due to invalid property values or missing required fields
error_dictionary.solution: Verify all property names and values against the CRM object schema before sending
Check that access token is valid and not expired. Use refresh token to get a new access token via POST /oauth/2026-03/token with grant_type=refresh_token

error_dictionary.description: Token lacks required OAuth scopes for the requested resource
causes: OAuth token missing required scope (e.g., crm.objects.deals.read for Deals API)
Private app token has restricted permissions
error_dictionary.solution: Verify OAuth scopes during authorization flow. Re-authorize with required scopes
Verify the object ID is correct and the object hasn't been deleted

error_dictionary.description: Duplicate detected or conflicting state (e.g., contact with same email already exists)
error_dictionary.solution: Use upsert or batch operations with the appropriate ID; check for existing records first

error_dictionary.description: Request URI exceeds limits (e.g., too many query parameters or values)
error_dictionary.solution: Reduce query parameters or use POST batch/read endpoints instead of GET with many IDs in query

error_dictionary.description: Attempting to sync large volume too quickly; system lock for ~2 seconds
error_dictionary.solution: Add a delay of at least 2 seconds between requests. Throttle batch operations

causes: Exceeded 110 requests per 10 seconds (OAuth public apps)
error_dictionary.solution: Implement per-portal throttling, use batch endpoints, add retry with exponential backoff. HubSpot SDK auto-retries 429s with backoff via numberOfApiCallRetries option

community_constraints.issue: 429 Too Many Requests for public OAuth apps
community_constraints.detail: Public apps limited to 110 req/10s per installed account. Multiple accounts sharing a queue cause head-of-line blocking.
community_constraints.workaround: Implement per-portal throttling queues, use batch endpoints, set SDK retries with numberOfApiCallRetries: 3

community_constraints.issue: CRM Search API high latency with large result sets
community_constraints.detail: Search endpoint performance degrades with complex filters on large datasets
community_constraints.workaround: Use batch GET by ID instead of search when fetching known records; paginate search results

community_constraints.issue: OAuth token expiration (30 min) requires robust refresh logic
community_constraints.detail: Access tokens expire after 30 minutes; many integrations fail to implement proper refresh token rotation
community_constraints.workaround: Always use refresh_token grant_type; store refresh token securely; preemptively refresh before expiry

community_constraints.issue: Property value validation on write operations
community_constraints.detail: 400 errors when sending invalid property values or property names that don't exist in the account
community_constraints.workaround: Use /crm/v3/properties/{objectType} to fetch available properties before writing; validate data types match

use_cases: Sync contacts and companies between HubSpot and external CRM
Automate deal creation from form submissions or website events
Bi-directional sync of lifecycle stages with marketing platforms
Send custom behavioral events from external app into HubSpot for scoring
Automated ticket creation from support@ emails or chat platforms
